text.content:
ALCHEMY

Also: Chemistry, Bombs, Mutations

You may perform the Inventory action to rapidly craft a potion with powerful but somewhat unpredictable effects. When you do so, choose one type of mix among those you have unlocked (basic, advanced, or superior) and spend the appropriate amount of Inventory Points. 

Mix

IP Cost

 Description

Basic

3

Roll two d20s and assign one to target and one to effect.

Advanced

4

Roll three d20s and assign one to target and one to effect.

Superior

5

Roll four d20s and assign one to target and one to effect.

When you create a mix, roll the amount of twenty-sided dice indicated by that mix, then assign one of those rolls to the target table (below) and one to the effect table (on the right). Discard all remaining dice, then describe the effects of the mix!

Example: you spend 5 Inventory Points for a superior mix and roll four twenty-sided dice. You roll 3, 14, 9 and 4. You might assign 14 to target and 9 to effect to grant yourself and all allies Resistance to air and fire; or you could go on the offensive and assign 9 to target and 4 to effect to deal bolt damage to a single enemy; or even assign 9 to target and 14 to effect to inflict four status effects on that foe!

Whatever your choice, the two dice you don’t assign will be discarded.

The two effects marked with "Any" on the effect table are always available and can be chosen if none of the available effects appeal to you.

TARGET

Die

The potion affects...

1-6

… you or one ally you can see that is present on the scene.

7-11

… one enemy you can see that is present on the scene.

12-16

… you and every ally present on the scene.

17-20

… every enemy present on the scene.

EFFECT

Die

Each creature affected by the potion...

Any

… suffers 20 poison damage. This amount increases to 30 damage if you are level 20 or higher, or to 40 damage if you are level 40 or higher.

Any

… recovers 30 Hit Points.

1

… treats their Dexterity and Might dice as if they were one size higher (up to a maximum of d12) until the end of your next turn.

2

… treats their Insight and Willpower dice as if they were one size higher (up to a maximum of d12) until the end of your next turn.

3

… suffers 20 air damage. This amount increases to 30 damage if you are level 20 or higher, or to 40 damage if you are level 40 or higher.

4

… suffers 20 bolt damage. This amount increases to 30 damage if you are level 20 or higher, or to 40 damage if you are level 40 or higher.

5

… suffers 20 dark damage. This amount increases to 30 damage if you are level 20 or higher, or to 40 damage if you are level 40 or higher.

6

… suffers 20 earth damage. This amount increases to 30 damage if you are level 20 or higher, or to 40 damage if you are level 40 or higher.

7

… suffers 20 fire damage. This amount increases to 30 damage if you are level 20 or higher, or to 40 damage if you are level 40 or higher.

8

… suffers 20 ice damage. This amount increases to 30 damage if you are level 20 or higher, or to 40 damage if you are level 40 or higher.

9

… gains Resistance to air and fire damage until the end of the scene.

10

… gains Resistance to bolt and ice damage until the end of the scene.

11

… gains Resistance to dark and earth damage until the end of the scene.

12

… suffers enraged.

13

… suffers poisoned.

14

… suffers dazed, shaken, slow, and weak.

15

… recovers from all status effects.

16-17

… recovers 50 Hit Points and 50 Mind Points.

18

… recovers 100 Hit Points.

19

… recovers 100 Mind Points.

20

…. recovers 100 Hit Points and 100 Mind Points.

INFUSIONS

Also: Arcane Ammunition, Blade Coatings, Combat Runes.

When you hit one or more targets with an attack, you may spend 2 Inventory Points to produce a special infusion and apply the corresponding effect to that attack (if the attack had the multi property, apply the effects of the infusion to each target).

You cannot apply more than one infusion to the same attack; producing and using an infusion are both part of the action you used to attack with the weapon.

BASIC INFUSIONS

INFUSIONS

EFFECT

Cryo

The attack deals 5 extra damage, and its damage becomes ice @ICON[ice].

Pyro

The attack deals 5 extra damage, and its damage becomes fire @ICON[fire].

Volt

The attack deals 5 extra damage, and its damage becomes bolt @ICON[bolt].

ADVANCED INFUSIONS

INFUSIONS

EFFECT

Cyclone

The attack deals 5 extra damage, and its damage becomes air @ICON[air].

Exorcism

The attack deals 5 extra damage, and its damage becomes light @ICON[light].

Seismic

The attack deals 5 extra damage, and its damage becomes earth @ICON[earth].

Shadow

The attack deals 5 extra damage, and its damage becomes dark @ICON[dark].

SUPERIOR INFUSIONS

INFUSIONS

EFFECT

Vampire

Choose one option: you recover an amount of HP equal to half the HP loss suffered by the target of the attack; or you recover an amount of MP equal to half the HP loss suffered by the target of the attack.

This infusion can only be used if the attack targeted a single creature.

Venom

The attack deals 5 extra damage, its damage becomes poison @ICON[poison], and each creature hit by the attack suffers poisoned.

MAGITECH

Also: Engineering, Golemcraft, Robotics.

This invention type grants a variety of different benefits.

MAGITECH OVERRIDE (BASIC)

Add the @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.aPfawWXZqKuHAAqj]{Magitech Override} feature to your character sheet.

During a conflict, you may use an action and spend 10 Mind Points to choose a construct or elemental enemy you can see that does not possess independent intelligence and is suffering from one or more status effects. If you do so, that enemy recovers from all status effects, then the Game Master reveals its entire profile and you may force it to immediately perform an action of your choice; during that action, the creature is treated as an ally of your group.

MAGICANNON (ADVANCED)

Add the @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.consumables.Item.AbazTRyaMTW4ouhx]{Magicannon (Item)} to your character sheet.

You may perform the Inventory action and spend 2 Inventory Points to create a magicannon (see below) and destroy any magicannon you previously created. If you do so and both your hand slots are empty, you may immediately equip the newly created magicannon and perform a free attack with it. Whenever you create a magicannon, choose what type of damage it deals among air, bolt, earth, fire, ice, or physical.

WEAPON

ACCURACY

DAMAGE

QUALITIES

Magicannon

【DEX + INS】 +1

【HR + 10】

Two-handed • Ranged • Cannot have Qualities.

MAGISPHERES (SUPERIOR)

Add three @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.consumables.Item.7dUU12f8IHa2tESo]{Magisphere (Superior)} to your character sheet.

You develop a magisphere for each of three spells from among those found in the Elementalist, Entropist, and Spiritist lists; these spells may come from the same list or from different lists (this does not count as “learning” or “knowing” these spells).

You develop a new magisphere upon reaching level 20, and another upon reaching level 40 (the same applies if you already reached those levels).

You may perform the Inventory action and spend 2 Inventory Points to perform the Spell action for free, casting one of the spells you have developed a magisphere for. The spell follows the normal rules (including MP costs and Magic Checks).

For spell breakdown, refer to: @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.handouts.JournalEntry.U0zSlmaK8PDCjMlV]{Spell Rules} or see Core Rulebook, page 114.

For spell lists, refer to:

  • Elementalist. @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.handouts.JournalEntry.hK8r8lsQNaknSqdq.JournalEntryPage.z1OeFUn5ckVmO5oW]{ELEMENTALIST SPELL LIST} or see Core Rulebook, page 188.

  • Entropist. @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.handouts.JournalEntry.jZeTJrK0mFsRyz8S.JournalEntryPage.z1OeFUn5ckVmO5oW]{ENTROPIST SPELL LIST} or see Core Rulebook, page 192.

  • Spiritist. @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.handouts.JournalEntry.L65ajg6cmHEk3zAP.JournalEntryPage.z1OeFUn5ckVmO5oW]{SPIRITIST SPELL LIST} or see Core Rulebook, page 208.

GADGET - ALCHEMY

  1. Add the following gadget to your character sheet: @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.SsR6UJXT65Q1qNO2]{Alchemy}

  2. Import the following rollable tables to your world: @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.rollable-tables.RollTable.TvH7gOE0xQYeimUF]{Alchemy: Effect} and @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.rollable-tables.RollTable.vZa3GMOzrEVma2Hv]{Alchemy: Target}

  3. Open the alchemy sheet and navigate to "Config" tab

  4. Under "Target Rollable Table" select "Alchemy: Target"

  5. Under "Effect Rollable Table" select "Alchemy: Effect"

GADGET - INFUSION

  1. Add the following gadget to your character sheet: @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.1tfYFkiXLuTOUmre]{Infusion}

  2. Perform an Accuracy Check like you'd normally do; roll a weapon.

  3. In the chat message, right click, select "Apply Infusion", and select an infusion in the dialog menu.

GADGET - MAGITECH

  1. Add the following gadget to your character sheet: @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.EmwWSYlFjlUSGPLL]{Magitech}

  2. For basic rank, add the following item to your character sheet: @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.aPfawWXZqKuHAAqj]{Magitech Override}

  3. For advanced rank, add the following item to your character sheet: @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.consumables.Item.AbazTRyaMTW4ouhx]{Magicannon (Item)}

  4. For superior rank, pick three spells from the following lists: @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.handouts.JournalEntry.hK8r8lsQNaknSqdq.JournalEntryPage.z1OeFUn5ckVmO5oW]{Elementalist Spells}, @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.handouts.JournalEntry.jZeTJrK0mFsRyz8S.JournalEntryPage.z1OeFUn5ckVmO5oW]{Entropist Spells}, and @UUID[Compendium.projectfu.handouts.JournalEntry.L65ajg6cmHEk3zAP.JournalEntryPage.z1OeFUn5ckVmO5oW]{Spiritist Spells}
